name: agent-kitchen
description: A kitchen for designing, grounding, harvesting, and auditing coding-agent harness artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Design, ground, harvest, and audit agent harnesses.
interface.longDescription: Forge the right harness artifact, ground it in supplied sources, harvest recurring corrections, and audit the setup that loads it.
defaultPrompt: Design the right harness artifact for this task.
Audit this coding-agent harness end to end.
Ground a harness decision in these sources.
